mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real GDP compresses equity risk premiums by confirming earnings expansion, yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in growth periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate below 6.0 percent signals labor market normalization, boosting consumer spending expectations and driving positive S&P 500 returns over the following month.
failure_condition: Forward returns in sub-6.0 percent periods are not statistically different from baseline (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous rises in the federal funds rate and consumer price index indicate inflationary pressure outpacing policy accommodation, increasing discount rates and compressing equity valuations over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces positive forward returns in more than 50 percent of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production confirms supply-side recovery, reducing input cost volatility and supporting near-term equity momentum.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no positive correlation with INDPRO momentum during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts surpassing 900 thousand units signal robust construction activity and household formation, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the following month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain flat or negative when starts exceed 900k.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in nonfarm payrolls and retail sales confirms synchronized labor and consumer demand expansion, reinforcing earnings outlooks and generating positive 20-day equity returns.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to predict positive returns in more than 40 percent of instances.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained low federal funds rates reduce borrowing costs for corporations, supporting leverage and equity valuations over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns are not significantly higher when rates remain below 3 percent.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly drop in retail sales exceeding 5 percent signals immediate demand weakness, triggering negative S&P 500 returns over the next week as earnings revisions turn adverse.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS declines more than 5 percent month-over-month
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in more than 50 percent of triggered instances.
